key_insights.insight: External promises should not be the primary driver; focus on honing your unique craft for long-term success.
key_insights.quote: Other than believing in the promises you should work on what your craft is to make sure that you can stand alone and not need anybody else to help you stand up that might not mean a straight away number one record, but at least you have your DNA. And that for me is timeless.

key_insights.insight: The fear of losing everything, often rooted in childhood experiences of insecurity, can drive overworking but can also negatively impact well-being.
key_insights.quote: Because there was so much insecurity in her childhood in terms of like things didn't feel secure um she's her work is the only thing that gives her that sense of security as an adult so she's fighting to maintain that

key_insights.insight: Therapy helps control negative thoughts and anxieties by learning where they 'live' and preventing them from spiraling.
key_insights.quote: My thoughts are going to be there. I've discovered that and I've accepted that. But now I'm really getting good at controlling where they live. Whereas before it was really hard for me to do that. And that's what therapy has really helped me do

key_insights.insight: Distinguishing between 'work life' and 'real life' is crucial for maintaining balance and mental well-being, especially in high-pressure careers.
key_insights.quote: I've now learned to really sort of separate that,like work life and real life. That doesn't feel like my real life anymore. My real life is having dinner at homeand like hanging out with my husband and becoming a stepmom and trying to figure out how to cook forkids you know that's kind of like like that the real life is that for me now

key_insights.insight: Connecting with others and planting seeds by forming genuine relationships can yield unexpected opportunities later in life, regardless of immediate outcomes.
key_insights.quote: I've made incredible relationships that's the one thing I'm very grateful for even if I've beendisappointed and sometimes those bridges haven't seen the end I've created incredible relationships with people that have seen my struggles and haveseen me work really hard and in a circumstance unfortunately not get to where it needs to bebut have seen you know what really did work hard on that and years down the line they would call meand be like I remember that and do you want to this?

key_insights.insight: True strength lies in resilience and the ability to rebound, continuously adapting and positioning yourself for new opportunities.
key_insights.quote: I am strong i am i think thefact that i'm still here means i'm strong i mean i run a business you know i've got people thati employ now you, and I feel like you can always come back.

key_insights.insight: Finding stability at home provides a strong platform to achieve new goals and push oneself further.
key_insights.quote: Home is stable now because home feels super stable which is a great platform to achieve

key_insights.insight: Question authority because big successes may have paths but they are not always right for you.
key_insights.quote: even if someone's successful and they have a path for us we should just do what they say and follow thatpath but but they're not always right

actionable_advice.advice: Prioritize self-care practices like exercise, meditation, and healthy eating to manage anxiety and maintain emotional well-being.
actionable_advice.how_to: Schedule dedicated time for workouts, explore different meditation techniques (even if just for a few minutes), and make conscious food choices.

actionable_advice.advice: Embrace continuous learning and discovery to fuel creativity.
actionable_advice.how_to: Actively seek out new music, artists, films, and books, and immerse yourself in learning about different subjects.

actionable_advice.advice: Establish non-negotiable routines that promote well-being
actionable_advice.how_to: Incorporate into each day practices such as exercise, and reading.

memorable_stories: Rita's story of coming to the UK as a refugee from Kosovo with her family.
Rita skipping school to desperately trying to find a cure after her mother was diagnosed with breast cancer.
Rita's panic attack before meeting then Prince Charles, which led to her therapy journey.
contrarian_claims: Trust can be a fault but more advantageous to see the best in people
Question authority as opposed to blindly following in fear.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Rita Ora: “I Lived With Constant Anxiety”…After Being Signed By Jay-Z At 18!!! (E265)
